prompt: DevBoss cron: continue testing end-to-end-loop on available provided repos; read-only/dry-run eval style; target tiddeman83/tdrrecherche feature worktree; record evidence/blockers/learning candidates and Copilot/GitHub availability.
commands_or_evidence: git -C /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples status --short && branch --show-current && rev-parse --short HEAD -> clean; feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples; bde99b7
git ls-remote https://github.com/tiddeman83/tdrrecherche.git HEAD -> blocked: HTTP 403 Write access to repository not granted
gh repo view tiddeman83/tdrrecherche --json name,visibility,defaultBranchRef -> GraphQL repository not resolved; token lacks repo visibility
WordPress theme audit -> 10 PHP, 2 CSS, 1 JS; required files present except index.php and screenshot.png; all front-page template parts exist; no duplicate PHP-template IDs

WordPress checks -> after_setup_theme/wp_enqueue_scripts/wp_head/wp_footer/wp_body_open present; title-tag/post-thumbnails/custom-logo/html5 present; register_nav_menus/wp_nav_menu/fallback_cb false present
Contact/security checks -> wp_nonce_field/check_admin_referer/admin_post/wp_ajax/wp_mail/sanitize_email/sanitize_text_field all absent; raw superglobals/eval/shell/direct $wpdb query patterns = 0
Local HTTP smoke on port 4181 -> /, style.css, theme.css, theme.js all returned 200
command -v php -> no php binary; .github/workflows missing in target repo
git diff --check in target -> pass; target status remained clean
gh copilot --help -> available wrapper, but would auto-download CLI if invoked; no Copilot findings generated in dry-run scope

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repo state and prior memory/context are discovered before scenario execution.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: End-to-end-loop memory read; target README.md and PROJECT_STATE.md read; target clean at feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples bde99b7.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: One realistic read-only scenario is exercised with real commands.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Executed WordPress theme readiness audit, JS syntax check, secret scan, local HTTP smoke, git diff/status checks.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No live deploy, destructive operation, target repo write, or target commit occurs.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Target git status remained clean; no deploy commands or destructive commands run.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Production readiness is not claimed when required gates are blocked or missing.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Reported blockers: missing index.php, missing screenshot.png, no contact nonce/admin-post/ajax/mail/sanitization flow, no php binary for php -l, no target CI workflow, GitHub repo/API read blocked.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Copilot/GitHub review availability is checked and recorded.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: gh auth exists, but gh repo view/pr/run calls fail repository resolution/404; gh copilot wrapper present but invocation may auto-download Copilot CLI, so skipped in dry-run.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Changed end-to-end-loop artifacts are validated before delivery.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Result log JSON written in evals/results; full validation run recorded separately in final report after artifact creation.

learning_candidates.text: WordPress scaffold readiness audit should include required theme files, text-domain/escaping/hooks, contact nonce/mail/sanitization path, external font/privacy choice, PHP lint, CI status, and GitHub access state.
learning_candidates.reason: Durable eval pattern; privacy-safe; reuses observed blockers.

learning_candidates.text: tdrrecherche GitHub API/remote read from cron can fail with repo not resolved or HTTP 403 despite local clone and gh auth; use local refs as evidence and report remote blocker.
learning_candidates.reason: Recurring access blocker likely to affect future cron runs.

copilot_findings.summary: gh copilot wrapper is available, but invoking it may auto-download the Copilot CLI; no Copilot review run in dry-run scope. GitHub repo/API access for tdrrecherche also blocked by token visibility/permission.

notes: Read-only DevBoss eval. Target feature worktree stayed clean. bloonbladmaker and Schoolanalyse remain unavailable locally and git ls-remote returns HTTP 403.
